claimText: UCLA DTS AI guidance lists a subset of available generative AI tools including Microsoft Copilot and M365 Copilot, Google Gemini, OpenAI ChatGPT Enterprise, Google Notebook LM, AWS Bedrock models, and Zoom AI Companion.
normalizedValue: DTS lists available GenAI tools including Copilot, Gemini, ChatGPT Enterprise, Notebook LM, AWS Bedrock models, and Zoom AI Companion.

citation.sourceRights: Official source retains original rights. Tracker metadata is open licensed; source text is quoted only as short evidence.
